title: ‘Developed ecosystem’ based on crypto has sprung up for AI agents: Report
summary: Stablecoins became the default settlement layer for AI agents as crypto payment rails can handle sub-dollar transactions more efficiently, says a report from Keyrock.

title: Kalshi backs prediction markets lobby group with former Trump official
summary: "We’re not going to be outspent or out-organized by entrenched interests protecting their monopolies," said John Bivona, head of government relations at Kalshi.

title: Abu Dhabi, Qatar Quietly Slip More Tankers Through Hormuz
summary: Abu Dhabi National Oil Co. has been quietly ferrying oil and gas shipments out of the Persian Gulf using its own fleet, apparently clearing both the Iranian navy and US warships to reach energy-starved customers.

title: European Gas Drops as US Signals Progress Toward Deal With Iran
summary: European natural gas dropped, extending last week’s decline, on optimism that the US and Iran are nearing a deal that would reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a critical chokepoint for global energy supplies.

title: Now You Can Buy Bitcoin, XRP and More in ChatGPT via MoonPay
summary: MoonPay's new app lets users buy cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin and Solana, through ChatGPT just by speaking with the chatbot.

title: Strategy Now Holds $65 Billion in Bitcoin—These Are Its Biggest BTC Buys
summary: How did Michael Saylor's firm amass a record stash of Bitcoin? Here's a look back at how Strategy made such massive gains.

title: NYT investigation alleges CFTC purged staff who questioned Trump-tied crypto firms
summary: Two officials who intervened to help three firms win approvals over staff objections, per the NYT, have since taken jobs at MoonPay and Gemini Titan.

title: Vitalik Buterin says Ethereum Foundation will be a ‘smaller ship,’ sell less ETH amid researcher exodus
summary: Buterin said the EF is choosing "longevity over breadth," selling less ETH and focusing exclusively on Ethereum's "CROPS" properties.

title: Trump says US will not ‘rush into a deal’ with Iran as talks continue
summary: Price of oil falls on hopes of an agreement that could reopen the Strait of Hormuz

title: Republican hardliners warn Trump is giving up too much in Iran talks
summary: US president is trying to quell an internal backlash from hawks who demand Tehran’s complete surrender
